---
title: "Group 21 Project"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
---

## Test loading the data
```{r run-main}
source("load.r")
# Load the data
data <- load_data("archive/olist_orders_dataset.csv")
#display the first few rows of the data
print(head(data))
```
